Market Intelligence Brief
Generated 14:02 ET
Extreme P/C divergence signals institutional dispersion hedging as gamma amplifies moves
KEY TAKEAWAYS
  • 1. Index puts at 1.65 ratio versus single-name calls at 0.86 reveals large-scale dispersion hedging ahead of Friday's NFP.
  • 2. Negative $16.7B SPY gamma amplifies all directional moves with SPX sitting just $25 below the critical $658 gamma flip level.
  • 3. AMD's 40,000-contract call block at May/June 185C-180C strikes positions for significant upside despite chip sector weakness.
NARRATIVE — negative gamma amplification

The most striking development is the extreme P/C divergence — index puts trading 1.65x calls while single-name calls dominate at 0.86x puts. This 0.79-point spread represents institutional dispersion hedging, where funds protect portfolios with index puts while expressing bullish conviction in individual names. The setup intensifies with SPY's $-16.7B negative gamma creating an amplification environment where any directional catalyst gets magnified. AMD's massive 40,000-contract call positioning across May 15 185C and June 18 180C strikes ($27-35 premium) stands out against the chip sector's technical weakness, with ARM showing death cross patterns despite +77 technical scores. The flow appears disconnected from sector fundamentals but aligns with Millennium's historical NVDA conviction plays, suggesting institutional rotation within semiconductors. With implied correlation at 0.30 — stock-specific regime — this single-name bullishness contradicts index hedging. Friday's NFP looms as the immediate catalyst with negative gamma positioned to amplify any labor market surprise. The 8 names in backwardation (AMD, ARM, COIN, GS, META, MRVL) price elevated near-term event risk, while the vol divergence flags across 20+ names suggest mispriced cross-asset relationships. XLE's 91.5 technical score with golden cross formation contrasts sharply with death crosses across META, MSFT, and XLF — creating clear sector rotation opportunities into the employment data.

Layer 1: Sentiment -35Layer 2: GEX -$16.7BLayer 3: P/C divergence 0.79ptsLayer 9: NFP in 3d
